title: GW Stats
description: a simplistic and easy to use Stat and skill mod
body:
GW Stats is a simple and easy-to-use stats and skills mod that adds four stats; Strength, Speed, Toughness, And luck, these each have their uses and skills(skills not made yet) this mod is made to be as compatible with other mods as possible. various actions can give you skill points at different rates and these points fill up pips that when the pip meter is filled will give you a level, pressing M will open up the mods menu, currently the only sub-menus made are the stat menu and the level exchange menu, strength will increase mining speed and damage to mobs, speed will increase your swim and walk/sprinting speed, toughness will give your more hearts as you level up in it (half a heart per 5 levels) and luck gives you a chance to pick up luck pips which automatically fill up an entire pip. this mod is a work in progress so please report to me in the comments or my discord if you come across any issues with it!

Discord: https://discord.gg/Yz8rZjmUyM
